description_long: This object is a flat, rectangular patch of sand with a uniform, fine-grained texture and a light beige color. The surface appears smooth and even, lacking any visible debris, footprints, or irregularities. The edges are straight and sharply defined, giving the sand patch a distinctly artificial or maintained appearance. There are no visible elevation changes, mounds, or depressions across the surface. The sand appears densely packed, suggesting it could be used in urban environments such as playgrounds, construction sites, or landscaped areas. The overall look is clean and minimal, with no signs of blending into other materials or surfaces.
description: A flat, rectangular, light beige sand patch with a smooth, even surface and sharply defined edges. The sand is fine-grained and appears clean and undisturbed.
description_view_0: A flat, beige sand patch viewed from the front, showing its rectangular shape and smooth, even surface.
description_view_1: The sand patch from a slightly rotated angle, still displaying its flatness and uniform color with no visible surface features.
description_view_2: A rear view of the sand patch, identical in appearance to the front, with a consistent, smooth texture.
description_view_3: A side angle of the sand patch, again showing the flat, even surface and sharply defined edges.
attribute_location: urban playground, construction site, or landscaped park area
attribute_boundary_definition: The boundaries are sharply defined and straight, with no visible blending or irregularity at the edges.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: The sand patch appears isolated, with clear, abrupt transitions at its edges and no blending into adjacent surfaces.
